scope: configs/config.example.yaml + code-simplifier results from TASK-001 code
note: TASK-002 is dependent on TASK-001. The 3 critical issues found in TASK-001 must be fixed before TASK-002 can be properly verified. TASK-002 itself (config documentation + code-simplifier review) is well-executed, but it documents the flawed TASK-001 implementation.

findings.config_example_yaml: PASS - Required field comments properly documented (telegram: bot_token+chat_id; email: host+from+to; webhook: url; all annotated with '缺失则 warn 并跳过'). Documentation is correct and matches TASK-001 stated intent.
findings.code_simplifier_execution: PASS - Tool executed, 0 changes applied. Code is idiomatic and consistent with sibling registerConfiguredStrategy function.
findings.code_simplifier_dispositions: PASS - All rejections documented with sound rationale; none conflict with QA findings.

inherited_critical_issues.issue: Short-circuit OR logic masks field validation failures
inherited_critical_issues.impact_on_task_002: Config comments document the contract correctly, but actual code doesn't fully enforce it. Test coverage gaps in TASK-001 also impact E2E validation (functional[1] from TASK-002: verify webhook → local HTTP server receives signal payload).
inherited_critical_issues.requirement: Must fix TASK-001 issues before TASK-002 E2E testing can meaningfully validate

inherited_critical_issues.impact_on_task_002: E2E test with local HTTP server won't discover this if it doesn't test whitespace-only edge cases

inherited_critical_issues.issue: Partial notifier failure silently drops notifications
inherited_critical_issues.impact_on_task_002: E2E may only test one notifier (webhook) per test run, not mixed success/failure scenarios

task_002_specific_findings.detail: Clearly documents bot_token+chat_id required for telegram, etc. Operator can understand expectations.
Zero changes applied to TASK-001 code; appropriate given the contract (log text, field names) is fixed by tests
TASK-002 done_criteria includes E2E: 'webhook 指向本地临时 HTTP server + 精简 watchlist 启动 serve，触发一轮分析，断言 routed 日志 "notifiers":1 且本地 server 收到信号 payload'
task_002_specific_findings.note: This E2E test will not be executed by QA until TASK-001 fixes are applied and verified. Current implementation has logic gaps that would complicate E2E debugging.

recommendations.status_transition: TASK-002 should remain in 'verified' pending TASK-001 rework. Once TASK-001 is fixed, re-verify TASK-002 E2E path.
recommendations.option_a: Both TASK-001 and TASK-002 → review_fix; Leader assigns TASK-001 fixes to dev; then re-verify both
recommendations.option_b: TASK-001 → review_fix; TASK-002 → accepted with note that E2E testing depends on TASK-001 fixes (higher risk)

confidence: HIGH - QA review is comprehensive; findings are blocking for production deployment
